title: Manila Heat Wave
lead: Manila is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.71. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, posing significant threats to the city.
body:
The current heat wave in Manila has reached critical levels, with a Z-Score of +3.71, indicating a significant deviation from normal temperatures. 
 The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.0 GG, which is substantially higher than the Heating Degree Day (HDD) value of 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 63%, and the wind speed is approximately 12.5 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact on Manila's residents and infrastructure.
